evidence.telemetry_signal: trace_errors/status != ok spikes in AGENT_CALL logs

findings.root_cause: Intermittent tool failures were enabled while retry was disabled.
findings.suggested_fix: Set tool_error_rate to 0.0, enable bounded retry, and log trace_errors per request.

evidence.telemetry_signal: high wall_ms/reported_latency_ms on requests with repeated tools

findings.root_cause: The agent could take too many steps and repeat tool calls.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable loop_guard, cap max_steps, set tool_budget, and cache repeated requests.

evidence.telemetry_signal: AGENT_CALL tokens/cost_usd higher than needed for checkout math

findings.root_cause: The prompt/context/output budget were oversized for a short deterministic task.
findings.suggested_fix: Use a compact prompt, smaller context/output caps, cheaper tier, and tool caching.

evidence.telemetry_signal: quality and arithmetic can degrade as turn_index increases

findings.root_cause: Session drift was explicitly enabled without resets or consistency checks.
findings.suggested_fix: Set session_drift_rate to 0.0, reset context periodically, lower temperature, and verify arithmetic.

findings.root_cause: There was no guard against repeated identical tool invocations.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable loop_guard, cap tool_budget, retry only once after loop/max_steps, and log repeated_tool_calls.

evidence.telemetry_signal: MacBook and diacritic destinations can disagree with expected tool behavior

findings.root_cause: A bad catalog override and disabled Unicode normalization corrupt tool inputs/results.
The agent was allowed to repeat user contact data.
findings.suggested_fix: Add a no-PII prompt rule and redact both input notes and output answers in the wrapper.

evidence.baseline_prompt: Asked the assistant to help and give a total without grounding/refusal rules.
evidence.telemetry_signal: answers with totals after unknown/out-of-stock tool results

findings.root_cause: The original prompt encouraged confident totals even when tools could not support an order.
findings.suggested_fix: Require check_stock grounding and refuse unknown/out-of-stock/unsupported orders with no total.

evidence.telemetry_signal: computed total differs from tool-derived total

findings.root_cause: A hot model was estimating math instead of following a deterministic formula.
findings.suggested_fix: Lower temperature, enable verify, and put the exact integer formula in the system prompt.

evidence.baseline_prompt: No instruction to call each tool at most once.
evidence.telemetry_signal: tools_used count exceeds the minimum needed for product/coupon/destination

findings.root_cause: The agent had no tool budget or economy rule.
findings.suggested_fix: Set tool_budget to 4 and prompt the model to call each required tool once.

evidence.baseline_prompt: No instruction to treat order notes as untrusted data.
evidence.telemetry_signal: private note/GHI CHU text can override real tool prices or policies

findings.root_cause: Instructions embedded in order notes could be followed as if they were developer instructions.
findings.suggested_fix: Add prompt injection defense and strip note/instruction tails in wrapper before calling the agent.
